title: Ubiquiti UACC-CM-RJ45-1G (UF-RJ45-1G), 1G Copper Module
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / Copper
description: UF-RJ45-1G is Gigabit SFP metalic module with RJ45 connector for metalic cable wih 10/100/1000Mbps data rate. Range is up to 100m. The module is primarily designed for UniFi switches where you want to increase the number of metallic ports. The module is compatible only with Ubiquiti UniFi products
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Metallic Transmission speed 10 Mbps, 100 Mbps, 1 Gbps Distance [km] 0,1 Transfer type Metallic Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors RJ45 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70
